# UC-19.3.5 · Windows Admin Center (WAC) Gateway Connection Telemetry and Administrative Action Audit

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Audit, Security, Operations &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We keep a readable diary of who opens the browser console, which machines they reach afterward, who may change those permissions, when plug-ins arrive or vanish, and which automation scripts ran—so odd administrative moves surface before silent takeover hides behind ordinary upkeep.*

---

## Description

Correlates **Windows Admin Center** gateway telemetry—**Microsoft Entra ID** (**OAuth**) versus **Negotiate** (**Kerberos**/**NTLM**) versus **smart-card** paths—with **CredSSP**/**Kerberos delegation** hints on **PowerShell Remoting** hops (**5985**/**5986**), **gateway-administrator** versus **gateway-user** posture changes surfaced through **`Set-WACAccess`**/**`Add-WACAccessGroup`**/**`Remove-WACAccessGroup`** (**2030**), **built-in**/**feed** extension churn (**2040**/**2041**), and **2050** orchestrated **PowerShell** runs so insider misuse, lateral movement rehearsal, or broken conditional-access flows surface before silent RBAC drift hides administrative intent.

## Value

**Splunk** stitches gateway browser sessions to **WinRM** connection bursts and extension timelines—giving incident reviewers defensible narratives when **Microsoft Defender for Cloud**/**Privileged Identity Management** **JIT** rotations coincide with **CredSSP** second-hop spikes, when **Azure Portal embedded** gateway usage diverges from on-premises **ServerManagementGateway** clusters, or when finance auditors demand proof that **gateway-user** principals never silently inherited **gateway-administrator** powers during merger integrations.

## Implementation

Enable **`Splunk_TA_windows`** **`WinEventLog`** inputs for **`Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience`** and **`WindowsAdminCenter`** into **`index=wac`**; schedule **`Get-WACUserAccessLog`**/**`Get-WACAccess`** PowerShell snapshots via scripted input (**15–30 minute**) cadence into **`wac:user_access`**/**`wac:rbac_snapshot`**; align **`props.conf`** **`FIELDALIAS`** maps with **`Set-WACEnvironment -AuthenticationMode`** labels (**ActiveDirectory**, **AzureAD**, **Smartcard**); throttle alerts against **`MaintenanceWindow`** lookups tied to **Patch Tuesday** WinRM listener restarts.

## Detailed Implementation

**Prerequisites**
- Deploy **Splunk Universal Forwarder** + `Splunk_TA_windows` (**Splunkbase 742**) on every **Windows Admin Center** gateway host (**Windows Server 2019/2022/2025**) regardless of whether you run **Server-Hosted**, Desktop (**6516+ localhost**-only — still exclude from fleet audits per `exclusions`), **Failover Cluster Hosted**, or rely on `microsoft.windowsAdminCenter` inside **Azure portal** for **Azure Arc-enabled servers**.
- Confirm `ServerManagementGateway` service (`Get-Service ServerManagementGateway`) binds **443/tcp** (gateway) or **6516+** (desktop) before Splunk indexing—mis-bound listeners masquerade as outages.
- Align `Set-WACEnvironment` contexts: `-AuthenticationMode ActiveDirectory` (Negotiate), `-AuthenticationMode AzureAD` (`-EnableAad` toggles OAuth / conditional access), `-AuthenticationMode Smartcard` (**mutual TLS** to gateway).
- Capture `Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience` channel (IDs **1000**, **1001**, **2000**, **2001**, **2010**, **2020**, **2021**, **2030**, **2040**, **2041**, **2050**, **2099**) alongside `WindowsAdminCenter` informational rows.
- Scripted enrichment hosts require `Microsoft.SME.*` modules (`Get-WACUserAccessLog`, `Get-WACAccess`, `Set-WACAccess`, `Add-WACAccessGroup`, `Remove-WACAccessGroup`, `Get-WACExtension`, `Install-WACExtension`) executed under **least-privilege** **gateway-administrator** automation accounts—not interactive `DOMAIN\Administrator` shells.
- Optional HEC JSON lines must scrub vault-sensitive payload columns (`scriptHash`, OAuth refresh artifacts, opaque ticket blobs)—never paste raw vault outputs into dashboards.

**Step 1 — Configure ingestion paths**
(1) `inputs.conf` on gateway UF:
```
[WinEventLog://Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience]
disabled = 0
start_from = oldest
current_only = 0
renderXml = true
index = wac
```
```
[WinEventLog://WindowsAdminCenter]
disabled = 0
start_from = oldest
current_only = 0
renderXml = true
index = wac
```
Mirror `Application` channel monitors when `ServerManagementGateway` surfaces `Errors` referencing `Microsoft.WindowsAdminCenter` adapters.
(2) Scripted inputs (**Heavy Forwarder** or UF `powershell.exe` wrappers **every 900–1800 seconds**) serialize `Get-WACUserAccessLog` into `wac:user_access` — stamp `gw_host`, `utc_snapshot`, `connectionAge` analog fields returned by cmdlet (`DurationMinutes`, `IdleMinutes` proxies).
(3) Companion job emits `Get-WACAccess`/`Get-WACExtension` CSV→JSON (`wac:rbac_snapshot`, `wac:extension_inventory`) capturing `gateway-administrator` versus `gateway-user` mappings plus `extension feed` URLs.
(4) Optional `wac:gateway:access` tails IIS-style HTTPS text logs beneath `%ProgramFiles%\WindowsAdminCenter\PowerShellModules\Microsoft.SME.Management.Adapters\logs\` — regex `cs-uri-stem`, `cs-method`, `sc-status`, `s-port` (**5985**, **5986**) before `stats`.
(5) Route `authorize.conf` roles so SOC analysts cannot read `prod` `PCI` gateways mixed into `wac` unless `need_to_know` approvals exist.

**Step 2 — Normalize fields before dashboards**
(1) Promote `props.conf` `EVAL`/`FIELDALIAS` chains translating `EventData` XML nodes (`TargetServer`, `UseCredSSP`, `AuthenticationModule`) into flat `targetServer`, `useCredSsp`, `authenticationMode` fields referenced across SPL macros.
(2) Maintain `macros/wac_evt_normalize` encapsulating `coalesce(EventCode, EventID, event_id)` so `2310` versus `2410` builds stay aligned.
(3) Stamp `cim_*` tags (**Authentication vs Change**) via `eval` `cim_lane` (**logon families → Authentication**, **RBAC/extension/environment → Change**) feeding `datamodel` overlays once `Accelerations` graduate.

**Step 3 — Saved searches**
Paste the `spl` field into `Saved Search` `wac_gateway_correlation` (cron: `*/15 * * * *`, `dispatch.earliest_time=-24h`). `Throttle` `host`/`risk` tuples `900s` unless `evt_nums` contains `2099` (**authentication-mode drift**) paired with `managed_powershell` (**2050**) inside `600s` windows.

```spl
index=wac (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience" OR sourcetype="WinEventLog:WindowsAdminCenter" OR sourcetype="wac:user_access" OR sourcetype="wac:rbac_snapshot")
earliest=-24h
| eval evt=tostring(coalesce(EventCode, EventID, event_id, "unknown"))
| eval evt_num=tonumber(evt)
| eval lane=case(
    evt_num IN (2000,2001), "gateway_session",
    evt_num=2010, "gateway_auth_failure",
    evt_num IN (2020,2021), "target_winrm",
    evt_num=2030, "rbac_assignment",
    evt_num IN (2040,2041), "extension_lifecycle",
    evt_num=2050, "managed_powershell",
    evt_num=2099, "gateway_environment",
    evt_num IN (1000,1001), "gateway_service",
    sourcetype="wac:user_access", "snapshot_access_log",
    sourcetype="wac:rbac_snapshot", "snapshot_rbac",
    true(), "other")
| eval principal=lower(trim(coalesce(userName, executedBy, assignedBy, User, user, actor, "")))
| eval managed_host=lower(trim(coalesce(targetServer, targetName, ComputerName, host_target, "")))
| eval credssp_hint=case(match(lower(_raw), "(?i)credssp"), "credssp_named", match(lower(_raw), "(?i)usesCredSsp|useCredSsp"), "credssp_flag", true(), "credssp_unknown")
| eval winrm_transport=lower(trim(coalesce(protocol, connectionType, "")))
| where lane IN ("gateway_auth_failure","target_winrm","rbac_assignment","extension_lifecycle","managed_powershell","gateway_environment","snapshot_access_log","snapshot_rbac")
| stats latest(_time) as last_seen,
       values(evt_num) as evt_nums,
       values(lane) as lanes,
       values(principal) as principals,
       values(managed_host) as targets,
       values(credssp_hint) as credssp_modes,
       values(winrm_transport) as transports,
       count as evt_lines
    by host
| eval risk=case(
    mvfind(lanes,"gateway_auth_failure")>=0 AND evt_lines>=12, "auth_burst",
    mvfind(lanes,"managed_powershell")>=0 AND mvfind(lanes,"gateway_environment")>=0, "policy_shift_with_scripting",
    mvfind(lanes,"extension_lifecycle")>=0 AND mvfind(lanes,"rbac_assignment")>=0, "supply_chain_then_acl",
    mvfind(lanes,"target_winrm")>=0 AND mvfind(credssp_modes,"credssp_named")>=0, "second_hop_activity",
    true(), "monitor")
| sort -last_seen
| head 200
```

**Query semantics:** `lane` buckets isolate **gateway session** (**2000**/**2001**) from **WinRM target** hops (**2020**/**2021**) from **RBAC deltas** (**2030**) from **extension lifecycle** (**2040**/**2041**) from **managed PowerShell** (**2050**) from **gateway configuration** (**2099**). `credssp_hint` foregrounds **CredSSP second-hop** investigations versus pure **Kerberos constrained delegation** flows per `PowerShell Remoting` guidance ([security notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/scripting/learn/remoting/winrmsecurity)). `risk` prioritizes `authentication` bursts concurrent with **policy-shift scripting** sequences.

**Macro hygiene:** wrap `where`/`stats` clauses inside `macros/wac_gateway_correlation_base` so `index=wac_lab` clones inherit identical SPL across staging stacks.

**Companion correlation:** schedule **`gateway_session`** (**2000**) volume beside **`gateway_auth_failure`** (**2010**) using **`transaction`** **`maxspan=300s`** windows whenever **`OAuth`** interrupt prompts inflate **`risk`** without genuine **`WinRM`** **`target_winrm`** hops (**2020**/**2021**).

**Macro encapsulation:** centralize **`evt_num`** **`coalesce`** chains inside **`macros/wac_evt_normalize`** so **`Splunk Enterprise`** and **`Splunk Cloud`** forwarders emit identical **`lane`** semantics across **`2310`** versus **`2410`** gateways.

**Step 4 — Evidence gathering**
(1) Compare `Windows Admin Center` UI (Connections blade, Extensions pane, **Gateway Users**) against `evt_nums`/`lanes` tuples inside Splunk.
(2) Export `Get-WACConnection` CSV capturing `ComputerName`, `CredentialSource`, `UseCredSSP` booleans cross-checked against `2020` `targetName` rows.
(3) `Export-Clixml` `Get-WACExtension` listings alongside `2040` `extensionVersion` proof for auditors.
(4) `Sign-ins` workbook (**Azure portal**) validates `OAuth` `2010` narratives whenever `AzureAD` authentication mode surfaces `conditionalAccessStatus` interplay (`failure`, `interactive` MFA).
(5) `FailoverClusters` `Get-ClusterResource` verifies `cluster-hosted` gateways migrated passive/active consistent with `1000`/`1001` pairs.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
- **`evt_num` blank while `_raw` populated** — `renderXml` disabled → re-enable `WinEventLog` stanza `renderXml=true` before XPath `FIELDALIAS` references `Event/System/EventID` versus `RenderingInfo` discrepancies.
- **`credssp_hint=credssp_unknown` everywhere** — `Message` localization hides `CredSSP` tokens → broaden `rex` against `EventData` XML `Data[@Name='UseCredSSP']` nodes.
- `snapshots empty` — `Get-WACUserAccessLog` requires **gateway-administrator** RBAC → verify automation `runAs` vault secrets versus `gateway-user` analyst shells.
- `duplicate hosts` — **Azure Portal embedded** gateways reuse `microsoft.windowsAdminCenter` identity distinct from **on-premises FQDN**—maintain `gw_identity` lookups bridging `Computer`/`host`/`gw_host` aliases.
- **`risk` stuck at monitor despite UI-visible faults** — thresholds tuned for **desktop mode** noise misapplied to **cluster-hosted** gateways → split `macros` via `installation_mode` tags (ServerHosted, Desktop, `AzureEmbedded`).
- **Extension inventory drift without Event ID 2040** — offline `msi` drops bypass `Install-WACExtension` auditing → reconcile `Get-WACExtension` deltas nightly.
- `OAuth` `2010` bursts amid `Conditional Access` named locations reshuffles → enrich `risk` with `Azure Sign-in` CSV joins before paging IR.
- `WinRM` `5986` TLS handshake failures mimic `2021` churn → inspect `Schannel` `36871`/`36874` companion logs.
- `2050` `scriptHash` mismatches vendor-published `SHA256` → escalate supply-chain verification independent of Splunk ingestion delays.
- `2099` storms during `Set-WACEnvironment` rehearsals accidentally `flip` `-AuthenticationMode` → capture `Desired State` `GIT` commits referencing `Infrastructure-as-Code` ids.
- `session-timeout` overlaps mistaken as `credential stuffing` → confirm `gateway` `idle` thresholds (`IdleTimeoutMinutes`) versus `browser` `cookie` renewal timers documented under **Microsoft Entra single sign-on** guides.

**Governance overlays**
Quarterly reconciliation compares `Get-WACAccess` CSV snapshots archived beside `2030` Splunk panels—RBAC spreadsheets stale faster than `gateway-user` onboarding scripts during mergers.

**Retention posture**
Align `indexes.conf` frozen buckets with `Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience` `Maximum` `Log` `Size` guidance so auditors replay `2099` tuples seven years later without `wevtutil` gaps.

## SPL

```spl
index=wac (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience" OR sourcetype="WinEventLog:WindowsAdminCenter" OR sourcetype="wac:user_access" OR sourcetype="wac:rbac_snapshot")
earliest=-24h
| eval evt=tostring(coalesce(EventCode, EventID, event_id, "unknown"))
| eval evt_num=tonumber(evt)
| eval lane=case(
    evt_num IN (2000,2001), "gateway_session",
    evt_num=2010, "gateway_auth_failure",
    evt_num IN (2020,2021), "target_winrm",
    evt_num=2030, "rbac_assignment",
    evt_num IN (2040,2041), "extension_lifecycle",
    evt_num=2050, "managed_powershell",
    evt_num=2099, "gateway_environment",
    evt_num IN (1000,1001), "gateway_service",
    sourcetype="wac:user_access", "snapshot_access_log",
    sourcetype="wac:rbac_snapshot", "snapshot_rbac",
    true(), "other")
| eval principal=lower(trim(coalesce(userName, executedBy, assignedBy, User, user, actor, "")))
| eval managed_host=lower(trim(coalesce(targetServer, targetName, ComputerName, host_target, "")))
| eval credssp_hint=case(match(lower(_raw), "(?i)credssp"), "credssp_named", match(lower(_raw), "(?i)usesCredSsp|useCredSsp"), "credssp_flag", true(), "credssp_unknown")
| eval winrm_transport=lower(trim(coalesce(protocol, connectionType, "")))
| where lane IN ("gateway_auth_failure","target_winrm","rbac_assignment","extension_lifecycle","managed_powershell","gateway_environment","snapshot_access_log","snapshot_rbac")
| stats latest(_time) as last_seen,
       values(evt_num) as evt_nums,
       values(lane) as lanes,
       values(principal) as principals,
       values(managed_host) as targets,
       values(credssp_hint) as credssp_modes,
       values(winrm_transport) as transports,
       count as evt_lines
    by host
| eval risk=case(
    mvfind(lanes,"gateway_auth_failure")>=0 AND evt_lines>=12, "auth_burst",
    mvfind(lanes,"managed_powershell")>=0 AND mvfind(lanes,"gateway_environment")>=0, "policy_shift_with_scripting",
    mvfind(lanes,"extension_lifecycle")>=0 AND mvfind(lanes,"rbac_assignment")>=0, "supply_chain_then_acl",
    mvfind(lanes,"target_winrm")>=0 AND mvfind(credssp_modes,"credssp_named")>=0, "second_hop_activity",
    true(), "monitor")
| sort -last_seen
| head 200
```

## Visualization

(1) **Timeline**: **`lane`** stacks (**session**, **target_winrm**, **rbac_assignment**) per **`host`** (**gateway** role). (2) **Table**: **`principal`**, **`targets`**, **`credssp_modes`**, **`evt_nums`**, **`risk`** for hunt pivots. (3) **Heatmap**: **`extension_lifecycle`** density versus **`gateway_environment`** (**2099**) rows before/after **`Set-WACEnvironment -EnableAad`** toggles. (4) **Single-value**: distinct **`gateway_auth_failure`** (**2010**) principals outside **`suppress_entra_ca_replay`** CIDR helpers. (5) **Drilldown**: raw **`Microsoft-ServerManagementExperience`** XML alongside **`Get-WACConnection`** CSV exports archived per change.

## Known False Positives

**Microsoft Entra Conditional Access MFA stair-steps** — administrators see **`2010`** bursts during interactive MFA refreshes while **`EnableAad`** keeps **`OAuth`** redirects alive; **`risk`** reads hostile though **`Sign-in`** diagnostics show benign **`interrupt`** prompts—suppress **`principal`** tuples documented inside **`ca_known_break_glass`** lookups until **`authenticationStrength`** policies stabilize.

**Bulk extension refreshes during approved maintenance** — **`2040`** storms land while **`Install-WACExtension`** pulls **Failover Cluster Manager**, **Storage Replica**, **Containers**, or third-party gallery packs inside one **`MaintenanceWindow`**—pair **`evt_lines`** velocity with **`Change`** ticket **`CHG`** identifiers before paging **`gateway-administrator`** crews.

**Failover-cluster-hosted gateway failovers** — **`1000`**/**`1001`** cycles plus **`2020`** reconnect waves replicate across passive/active nodes during **`Move-ClusterRole`** rehearsals—differentiate **`ServerManagementGateway`** service migrations from lateral movement by tagging **`cluster_network`** / **`cluster_owner_node`** enrichment pulled from **`Get-ClusterResource`** exports mirrored nightly.

**Browser tab-recovery after laptop reboot** — dormant **`chrome`**/**`edge`** sessions resurrect **`2000`**/**`2020`** bursts without fresh MFA challenges because **`OAuth`** cookies **`rehydrate`**—tie **`last_seen`** spikes to workstation reboot telemetry (`Kernel-General` **1074**) instead of attacker **`OAuth`** replay alone.

**Patch Tuesday WinRM listener recycle cycles** — **`net stop winrm && net start winrm`** sequences temporarily **`raise`** **`2021`**→**`2020`** churn against identical **`managed_host`** targets—suppress rows where **`Computer`** / **`host`** pairs align with **`installed_kb`** inventories feeding **`suppress_kb_wave`** lookups.

**CredSSP teaching-tool spikes** — engineers deliberately **`Enable-WSManCredSSP`** on lab VLANs mirroring **`2020`** **`useCredSsp=true`** patterns—fence **`risk`** / **`credssp_named`** alerts using **`lab_cidr`** markers distinct from **`production`** **`Hyper-V`** fabrics.
